channel.title: Product Updates — HomeSurvey.ai
channel.description: The latest features, improvements, and fixes from HomeSurvey.ai. See what's new in AI-powered virtual moving surveys.

item.title: Interactive AI Move Summary
item.description: The AI generates a complete move playbook — crew size scenarios, truck counts, packing hours, risk flags, and estimator tips. Edit the inventory and hit Recalculate to see updated estimates instantly.

item.title: Voice Notes with Auto Exclude
item.description: During the video walkthrough, customers speak naturally about what stays and what goes. The AI transcribes, classifies, and auto-excludes items from the inventory — saving reps significant review time.
